chunks.text: Jan Rabaey receives 2026 IEEE Donald O. Pederson Award in Solid-State Circuits - EECS at Berkeley EECS Professor Emeritus Jan Rabaey has been selected to receive the 2026 IEEE Donald O. Pederson Award in Solid-State Circuits. This prestigious award recognizes his outstanding contributions to the field of solid-state circuits, as measured by his impact on society, innovation, and leadership in the field. Rabaey was cited “for seminal and visionary contributions to the VLSI implementation of low-energy signal processing and communication systems.” Categories Faculty Honors Research Related Links IEEE Donald O. Pederson Award in Solid-State Circuits View Open Faculty Positions
